calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Pay Judgment Installments And For Say Of Execution Of Judgment; C.C.P. Section 582.5, Veh Code Section 16379; Points And Authorities; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER GONZALEZ NUNEZ's Motion To Pay Judgment Installments And For Stay Of Execution Of Judgment; C.C.P. Section 582.5, Veh Code Section 16379.

Defendant Christopher Gonzalez Nunez's unopposed Motion To Pay Judgment in Installments And For Say Of Execution Of Judgment Pursuant to C.C.P. Section 582.5 and Veh Code Section 16379 is OFF CALENDAR.

Defendant failed timely to file proof of service of his moving papers. (See California Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) The court will not consider the merits of an unopposed motion absent timely submission of proof that the moving papers were properly served.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
